name: MSI MPG B860I EDGE TI WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8600(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - Thunderbolt 4 (DP 2.1 Alt Mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Intel Killer 5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 (B860IEDGETIWIFI)
shortName: MSI MPG B860I EDGE TI WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Compact Intel LGA 1851 mini-ITX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 7 for high-end mini PC builds.
